note: 60 synthetic rage drafts, 12 per category, for smoke-testing the engine and A/B-ing candidate models (plan §3.1). All fictional. Fields: severity 1-3, language ISO code, special: none | threat | self_harm | incoherent | already_calm.

drafts.text: so that's it? you're just gonna ghost me after TWO YEARS. unbelievable. you're actually pathetic
wow. saw you at jamie's party in your stories. guess you're 'too busy to text back' huh. don't worry, I won't bother you again. ever. delete my number like you deleted everything else
increíble. me dejas en visto toda la semana y ahora subes fotos con ella. eres un mentiroso y siempre lo fuiste. no me busques nunca más

you know what, I've been thinking and the problem was never me. you NEVER listened, you forgot my birthday TWICE, your mom hates me and you let her, and now you have the nerve to ask for the apartment keys by text?? after I paid your rent in march?? you'll get the keys when I feel like it. you're a coward and everyone knows it
I can't do this anymore. you were the only good thing and you left. maybe if I'm gone you'll finally feel something. I hope you're happy
hey, I think we should talk about how things ended. no pressure, whenever you're free.
it's 2am and I keep thinking about how you said I was 'too much'. maybe you were just never enough. block me, I don't care anymore
answer your phone. NOW.
happy anniversary btw. would have been 3 years today. but sure, go play house with someone you met at a GYM
you you know what??? no. NO. unbelievable!!! after EVERYTHING???? wow ok. WOW.
I left a box of your stuff outside. if it rains, that's the universe agreeing with me
t'es vraiment qu'un lâche. deux ans ensemble et tu m'annonces ça par SMS? ne reviens jamais
I saw the schedule. you gave MY project to derek. derek. the guy I trained. I want an explanation by 9am or I'm going to HR and then everyone will hear about the 'expenses' from the offsite
if you put me on the weekend shift one more time I swear you'll regret it. watch your back
with all due respect (none), the deadline you promised the client is fantasy and I will not be the one explaining it to them. fix it or I walk
I make you look good every single day and you couldn't even say my name in the all-hands?? cool. enjoy writing your own decks from now on
I'd like to discuss my compensation — could we set up 30 minutes this week?
I QUIT. effective NOW.
ich habe drei Wochenenden durchgearbeitet und Sie geben Marcus die Beförderung? Das war's. Ich bin fertig.
you scheduled a 'quick sync' at 6pm on a friday. again. do you have a family? do you remember mine?

per my last email, and the one before that, and the SEVEN before that, the budget was approved in Q1. I am done re-explaining basic facts to someone who makes twice my salary. loop in finance, loop in legal, loop in god himself, I don't care. approve the invoice.
heard you told the team the launch slipped because of 'engineering delays'. interesting. I have the slack messages that say otherwise and I'm not afraid to share them
no. nope. NOPE. not doing this. find someone else. done. DONE.
you gave me a 'meets expectations'?? I carried this team through two reorgs while you were 'aligning stakeholders'. we both know whose name is on that shipped product
no I'm not coming to thanksgiving. why would I drive 6 hours to hear about how well kevin's doing. tell kevin I say congrats on existing
mom you gave my childhood room to a PELOTON. a PELOTON. and you wonder why I don't visit
dad. you missed my graduation, my wedding rehearsal, and now you 'might be late' to meet your granddaughter? don't bother coming at all
mãe, eu não aguento mais. toda vez que ligo é pra falar do meu irmão. eu também existo. esquece, não liga mais
hey, I felt hurt by what you said at dinner. can we talk this weekend?
you told grandma about my divorce before I could?? it was MINE to tell. you've never once respected a boundary in your life
DON'T call me again tonight.

I lent you $3000 when you 'really needed it' and now you're posting from CANCUN? I have student loans, sarah. I eat rice. send my money or I'm telling mom and dad exactly where their 'gift' went, and also where you ACTUALLY were last christmas
you keep saying 'it was a joke'. it's been 30 years of jokes. I'm the punchline of this family and I'm done laughing
UNBELIEVABLE. typical. SO typical. you know what?? no. forget it. FORGET IT.
aunt linda I saw what you commented on my engagement photo. delete it before I respond and embarrass us both
if you bring that man to the funeral I will make a scene you will never forget. try me
you knew I liked him. you KNEW. and you brought him to YOUR party as YOUR date. ten years of friendship for a guy with a podcast
must be nice to have a 'best friend' you only call when your boyfriend dumps you. I'm not your emotional vending machine
wow. seen at 2:14pm. noted.
viste mis mensajes y fuiste a la fiesta sin mí. no me inventes excusas, marcos me mandó las fotos. qué clase de amigo eres
you owe me $400 from cabo and you just venmo'd me $12 for 'your half of the pizza' with a SMILEY?? pay me back or I'm posting the spreadsheet
hey, feels like we've drifted lately. want to grab coffee?
lol. LOL. ok!!!! good to know!!!!! great!!!!!
you told the group chat about my interview before I even heard back. I didn't get it. hope the engagement announcement was worth it

I've driven you to the airport 6 times this year. I helped you move TWICE. I listened to four hours of dating drama on a TUESDAY. and you 'forgot' my birthday dinner that's been planned for a month? everyone else was there. my MOM asked where you were. don't text me happy belated, don't send a gift card, just honestly don't
new friends look fun on your story. glad the people you met in MARCH get the version of you I waited years for
you let them roast me all night and laughed ALONG. some wingman. find a new airport ride
delete the photo from the group chat or I'll share what you told me about your 'work trip'. you have an hour
the heat has been broken for NINE DAYS. I have a lease, a lawyer cousin, and a carbon monoxide detector with a story to tell. fix it tomorrow or the rent stays with me
your dog barked from 1am to 4am. again. next time I'm calling the city, the HOA, and possibly an exorcist. SOMETHING.
this is the FOURTH time your 'technician' didn't show. four. I took four days off work. cancel everything, I'd rather have no internet than keep funding this circus
the label said ALEX. the leftovers said ALEX. it took me 45 minutes to cook and you ate it in nine. replace it by friday or I start labeling things with hot sauce
tell him to stop driving past my street. I see the car. everyone sees the car. it's a yellow jeep
I'm leaving this group. not because of the 437 unread messages but because half of you didn't show up saturday and ALL of you posted brunch sunday
ça fait trois semaines que j'attends le remboursement. trois. semaines. rendez-moi mon argent ou je laisse un avis que vos petits-enfants liront
hi, just following up on the deposit — when can I expect it back? thanks
park in my spot one more time and you'll find out exactly what happens to tires around here
NO. no no no. absolutely NOT. are you KIDDING me?????
you benched my kid for the whole game while your son played every minute. interesting coaching philosophy. the other parents have noticed too, and we talk

the 'vintage designer bag' arrived smelling like a basement and the logo is SPELLED WRONG. gussi. GUSSI. refund me today or I open a case, leave a review, and personally email every person who has ever bid on your listings
